title: Find My Device - User location on the map
scenario: Find My Device map shows blue dot location indicator that changes appearance between zoom levels on Android
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. Ensure GPS location permission is granted to the app.
5. Observe the map display showing the user's current location.
expected: When zoomed out, the user's current location is displayed as a full blue dot on the map. When zoomed in, the location is shown as a blue circle with a full blue dot in the center.
